/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/MediaPlayer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/audiomanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/deviceswidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/playerwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/equalizerwidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/settingswidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/fileswidget.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MediaPlayer.dir/playlistswidget.cpp.o -o MediaPlayer  /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Multimedia.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Svg.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 -lbass -lbass_fx /usr/lib/libtag.so /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
